content: {"file": "frontend/storyforge-ui/.angular/cache/17.3.17/vite/deps/@angular_core.js", "summary": "This file contains Angular core module exports and internal utilities for application bootstrapping, component compilation, change detection, dependency injection, rendering, and other framework functionalities.", "rules": [{"name": "Application Initialization", "description": "Handles the initialization of an Angular application with environment-specific configurations and listeners.", "conditions": ["APP_INITIALIZER token is used to define asynchronous tasks before app starts"], "actions": ["Runs provided functions or observables when the platform initializes"]}, {"name": "Component Compilation", "description": "Provides utilities for compiling components, directives, pipes, and modules at runtime.", "conditions": ["compileComponent, compileDirective, compileNgModule, compilePipe are used to dynamically create component definitions"], "actions": ["Generates component metadata and factory functions"]}], "dependencies": ["./chunk-6DT2DWOU.js"]}
